new.description: A technical walkthrough of exploiting CVE-2021-44228 (Log4Shell) in a UniFi Network Application environment, including MongoDB manipulation and privilege escalation.

new.description: Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228) defense lab — nginx + Coraza WAF dynamic module + OWASP CRS v4. Educational use only.

new.name: SecureOps-Lab
new.description: Performed a live cybersecurity assessment on a university Linux server. During analysis, active attack activity was identified, including brute-force authentication attempts and exploitation attempts targeting Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228).
